name: Crockpot Basic Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 5 1/2 pounds Pot roast or rump roast
7 Carrots, pared and cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the meat well with seasoned salt.
2. Place half of the vegetables in the bottom of the removable crockpot liner.
3. Place the meat on top of the vegetables.
4. Add the remaining vegetables to the pot.
5. Dissolve the beef bouillon cubes in the water and pour over the vegetables and meat.
6. Place the liner in the base of the crockpot.
7. Cover and cook on AUTO for 9 hours, or LOW for 10-12 hours, or HIGH for 6-7 hours.
